hero_tagline.name: hero_tagline
hero_tagline.default: 'Bloom helps leading mobility, energy, robotics brands scale faster through our vetted network'

discover_heading.name: discover_heading
discover_heading.default: 'Discover and access a vetted supply chain network ready to scale'

discover_body.name: discover_body
discover_body.default: 'Bloom intelligently matches brands with vetted supply chain and operations partners tailored to their products requirements throughout its lifecycle.'

manage_body.name: manage_body
manage_body.default: 'Discover, bid, book, and pay supply chain and operation partners all on a single platform.'

pay_body.name: pay_body
pay_body.default: 'Leverage BloomPay to pay all your vendors in one place and access extended payment terms up to 120 days.'

ecosystem_body.name: ecosystem_body
ecosystem_body.default: 'With deep roots in the hardware industry, we provide the support and connections you need to flourish, ensuring your business blossoms in an ever-evolving landscape.'

hero_headline.name: hero_headline
hero_headline.default: 'Supply chain complexity is killing your momentum'

hero_body.name: hero_body
hero_body.default: 'Hardware innovation should be about breakthroughs, not spreadsheets, shipping labels, and supplier drama. Bloom unblocks your growth by giving you instant, vetted access to the domestic manufacturing, assembly, logistics, and service partners that power today''s most ambitious hardware brands.'

built_for_heading.name: built_for_heading
built_for_heading.default: 'Built for the brands building the future'

built_for_body.name: built_for_body
built_for_body.default: 'Bloom is purpose-built to support the unique operational challenges of today''s most advanced hardware categories, where complexity, regulation, and logistics often stall growth.'

coast_to_coast_body.name: coast_to_coast_body
coast_to_coast_body.default: 'Our vetted network covers the entire US, linking you to local specialists and Fortune 100 powerhouses alike. Get fast, competitive access to partners ready to build, deliver, and service for you.'

framework_heading.name: framework_heading
framework_heading.default: 'Proven framework built for scaling hardware brands'

framework_body.name: framework_body
framework_body.default: 'Bloom orchestrates the heavy-lift of hardware operations so you can focus on product and customers. Here''s exactly what happens after you request access.'

bloom_pay_body.name: bloom_pay_body
bloom_pay_body.default: 'Leverage BloomPay to pay all your vendors in one place and access on platform extended payment terms up to 120 days.'

cta_heading.name: cta_heading
cta_heading.default: 'Ready to cut costs, launch faster, and de‑risk your operations?'

hero_headline.name: hero_headline
hero_headline.default: 'Work with the most promising hardware brands, vetted by Bloom.'

hero_body.name: hero_body
hero_body.default: 'Unlock a pipeline of qualified projects from fast-growing hard-tech companies, backed by Bloom''s rigorous screening and centralized payments.'

criteria_body.name: criteria_body
criteria_body.default: 'Each partner is evaluated across 8 core criteria before joining the Bloom network.'

framework_body.name: framework_body
framework_body.default: 'Bloom matches proven providers with vetted hardware brands and handles the back-office—RFQs, milestones, and payments—so you can focus on execution.'

cta_heading.name: cta_heading
cta_heading.default: 'Apply to join the elite providers on Bloom''s Network'

hero_body.name: hero_body
hero_body.default: 'Bloom brings hard tech brands into an operations ecosystem that nurtures every stage of their product''s growth.'

what_we_do_heading.name: what_we_do_heading
what_we_do_heading.default: 'We provide the support and connections you need to flourish.'

what_we_do_body.name: what_we_do_body
what_we_do_body.default: 'Just as a thriving natural ecosystem relies on interconnected relationships and balanced processes to flourish, Bloom''s operations ecosystem is built on a foundation of collaboration and resilience. By nurturing a network that thrives on the diverse capabilities of our partners, we ensure that the hard tech industry can thrive, adapt, and grow.'

who_we_are_heading.name: who_we_are_heading
who_we_are_heading.default: 'We are committed to exploring the full potential of hardware.'

who_we_are_body.name: who_we_are_body
who_we_are_body.default: 'We are a global team of builders and connectors with deep roots in the hardware industry. Together, we are exploring the full potential of hard tech products, optimizing their places within our daily lives.'

ecosystem_heading.name: ecosystem_heading
ecosystem_heading.default: 'Bloom is an ecosystem of operations services'

hero_body.name: hero_body
hero_body.default: 'Whether you''re a hardware brand, a service provider, or just have a question — drop us a line and the right person at Bloom will get back to you.'

form_section_body.name: form_section_body
form_section_body.default: 'Fill out the form and we''ll route your message to the right team — usually a same-day response on weekdays.'
